hero.title: Websites Built for
hero.subtitle: Professional websites with built-in SEO, GEO, and native bilingual support. Built to rank, built to convert.

services.title: Full-Stack Web Services
services.subtitle: From landing pages to complex web applications — we engineer digital experiences that drive results.
services.item_1_desc: Technical SEO from the ground up. Schema markup, Core Web Vitals optimization, semantic HTML, and structured data that search engines love.
services.item_2_desc: Generative Engine Optimization for AI search (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini). Entity-based content structures and AI-indexable markup.
services.item_3_desc: Native internationalization with hreflang tags, locale-aware routing, and professional translations. Reach every market.
services.item_4_desc: Near-perfect Lighthouse scores. Sub-2s load times. Optimized assets, lazy loading, and CDN strategies for blazing-fast delivery.
services.item_5_desc: Pixel-perfect across all devices. Mobile-first architecture with fluid layouts that look stunning from phone to 4K.
services.item_6_desc: Clean, maintainable code using Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, React, or Next.js — chosen for your project, built to last.
services.item_7_desc: Professional email setup via Gmail — send & receive from your own domain (noreply@yourdomain.com). Branded, reliable, and hassle-free.
services.item_8_desc: Contact forms that save submissions to Google Sheets and auto-reply with a branded email — "We'll get back to you shortly." Zero friction, full data control.
services.item_9_desc: Your site protected by Cloudflare — DDoS protection, SSL/TLS encryption, WAF firewall. Trusted by millions of websites worldwide.

portfolio.title: Live Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Real websites, real results — crafted with care and built to last.
portfolio.project_1_desc: A sleek personal website showcasing portfolio, skills, and services — optimized for SEO and global audiences with multi-language support.
portfolio.project_2_desc: A professional business website with integrated contact forms, Google Sheets data capture, and auto-reply email confirmation.
portfolio.project_3_desc: An Indonesian corporate website built for local and international markets, featuring GEO optimization and responsive design for all devices.

features.title: Built for the Modern Web
features.subtitle: We don't just make websites pretty — we make them work harder for your business.
features.item_1_desc: Your site surfaces in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE answers. GEO is the next frontier — we're already there.
features.item_2_desc: Every site we build supports multiple languages from day one. Switch between EN and 中文 right on this page.
features.item_3_desc: No bloat, no frameworks you don't need. Every line of code serves a purpose and is maintainable long-term.
features.item_4_desc: Rich results in Google Search. FAQ, How-To, Organization, and LocalBusiness schemas implemented correctly.

demo.title: i18n in Action
demo.subtitle: This entire page is available in multiple languages. Toggle between English and Traditional Chinese using the button above.
demo.note: Professional-grade translations by native speakers, not machine translation.

contact.title: Ready to Build Something Great?
contact.subtitle: Let's talk about your project. We respond fast and give honest, straightforward advice.
contact.card_subtitle: Reach us on WhatsApp — fastest way to start.

sneak.label: Option A Upgraded
sneak.title: Digital Menu & Order System
sneak.desc: The next evolution of Option A — let restaurants showcase menus, accept orders, and manage the kitchen. Customers scan QR codes to browse, order, and pay from their phones.
sneak.f1: QR Code Menu — Every table gets its own menu
sneak.f2: Easy Ordering — Customers order from their phone
sneak.subtext: For current Option A clients — seamless upgrade available

footer.built_with: Built with clean code & attention to detail.
